impact: The worker was inventing validator expectations that did not match the committed fixture. This narrows the next cycles to deterministic diagnostics and prompt guardrails so the daemon inspects fixture shape first, avoids broad contract rewrites, and resumes the domain validation only after supervision is improved.
summary: Replan the PP&D daemon after repeated public-crawl fixture validator failures by blocking the misaligned retry and adding narrow supervisor-repair tasks focused on fixture-shape diagnostics before the validator is attempted again.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
